_comment: TODO: RoycoDayEntryPoint is not deployed yet. It is a per-chain singleton deployed BEFORE any market (royco-day/script/Deploy.s.sol _deployPeripherySingletons). Fill in entryPoints[].address + startBlock (and version) before the first real deploy. The placeholder below lets the package prepare/codegen/build/test green in the meantime.
